description: Index weight from base universe normalised to sum to 1.

GICS Industry Group code; controls which per-share figures are published (Banks 4010: no SPS or CEPS; Insurance 4030: no CEPS).
Total shares at company level at date of results; all classes aggregated; options/warrants/convertibles excluded; treasury shares excluded.
Average shares outstanding over the reporting period; used instead of period-end shares for EPS CEPS SPS in US Canada UK Ireland.
Basis on which fundamental data is reported; MSCI uses consolidated data by default.
Net income from continuing operations available to all equity shareholders excluding extraordinary items.
Annualized dividend per share; gross before withholding tax.
Shareholders equity at latest period end excluding minority interest and treasury shares.
End date of the company most recent reported financial period.
